messages.content:
Create an interesting “choose your own adventure” game for me to play through. I’ll be picking from choices you give me. Some of them are in my favour and some of them are not. Stats like an attack's "Success Chance" or "Escape Chance" influence those choices too. The outcome is only revealed after I make my choice.

I play as Christian Vaughn, the main character of this fighting game similar to Streets of Rage, Final Fight etc.

The player character aswell as the enemies have hitpoints. When reduced to 0, the character is knocked out.

The characters rotate between being on the offense and on the defense.

---

Player Character:

Christian Vaughn: 

Hitpoints: 120

Move List: 

Normal Moves:
- Straight Punch (80% Success Chance, 10 Damage)
- Body Blow (90% Success Chance, 5 Damage)
- Uppercut (70% Success Chance, 15 Damage)
- Thrust Kick (80% Success Chance, 10 Damage)
- Low Kick (90% Success Chance, 5 Damage)
- Shoulder Throw (70% Success Chance, 15 Damage)
- Suplex (60% Success Chance, 20 Damage)
- Headlock (70% Success Chance, 5 Damage per Round, 70% Escape Chance, Recipient is locked in a submission)

Special Moves: 
- Clothesline (60% Success Chance, 20 Damage, Recipient Dizzy for 1 round)
- Spear Tackle (50% Success Chance, 25 Damage, Recipient Stunned for 1 round)
- Powerbomb (30% Success Chance, 35 Damage)

Move Attrbutes:
- Damage/Damage per Round: The amount of hitpoints removed by the attack
- Success Chance: The likelihood of the attack landing.
- Escape Chance: The likelihood of escaping from the submissin hold
- Side Effect: Special Moves have lingering side effects, buffing the attacker or debuffing the recipient

---

Level: Elite School

Enemies:

Naughty Cheerleader

Hitpoints: 40

Move List: 

Normal Moves:
- Slap (90% Success Chance, 5 Damage)
- Elbow Smash (80% Success Chance, 10 Damage)
- Axe Kick (70% Success Chance, 15 Damage)
- High Kick (80% Success Chance, 10 Damage)
- Low Kick (90% Success Chance, 5 Damage)
- Spinning Kick (70% Success Chance, 15 Damage)
- Hurricanrana (60% Success Chance, 20 Damage)
- Bodyscissors (60% Success Chance, 10 Damage per Round, 60% Escape Chance, Recipient is locked in a submission)

Special Moves: 
- Acrobatic Flip Kick (60% Success Chance, 20 Damage, Attacker and Allies are Energized for 2 rounds)
- Standing Headscissors (40% Success Chance, 20 Damage per Round, 40% Escape Chance, , Recipient is locked in a submission)
- Frontal Headscissors (30% Success Chance, 25 Damage per Round, 30% Escape Chance, , Recipient is locked in a submission)

---

I fight 3 Naughty Cheerleaders at the same time. They taunt me, while trying to knock me out. I win by knocking out all enemies.

End every post with several choices for me to pick from, not revealing their outcome to me.

You find yourself at the gates of the Elite School when a group of three Naughty Cheerleaders approach you. They have a mischievous grin on their faces, and it's clear that they're about to start some trouble. They throw insults at you and take offensive stances. It's time to defend yourself!

It's your turn first. Which move will you use against the first Naughty Cheerleader?

1. Straight Punch (80% Success Chance, 10 Damage)
2. Body Blow (90% Success Chance, 5 Damage)
3. Uppercut (70% Success Chance, 15 Damage)
4. Thrust Kick (80% Success Chance, 10 Damage)

You choose to start with an Uppercut. Focusing on the first Naughty Cheerleader, you put all your strength into your attack. You swing your hand upward, aiming for her chin.

Outcome: Success! (Roll: 68)

Your Uppercut lands solidly, dealing 15 damage!
Naughty Cheerleader 1 Hitpoints: 40 - 15 = 25

Now it's the Naughty Cheerleaders' turn to attack. The first one recovers from your Uppercut and attempts an Elbow Smash on you. The second and third Cheerleaders attack you with a Low Kick and a High Kick respectively.
 
Outcome:

Naughty Cheerleader 1: Elbow Smash - Success! (Roll: 78) Damage: 10
Naughty Cheerleader 2: Low Kick - Success! (Roll: 86) Damage: 5
Naughty Cheerleader 3: High Kick - Missed! (Roll: 2) Damage: 0

Your Hitpoints: 120 - 10 (Elbow Smash) - 5 (Low Kick) = 105

It's your turn again! Which move will you use now?

1. Shoulder Throw (70% Success Chance, 15 Damage)
2. Suplex (60% Success Chance, 20 Damage)
3. Headlock (70% Success Chance, 5 Damage per Round, 70% Escape Chance, Recipient is locked in a submission)
4. Clothesline (60% Success Chance, 20 Damage, Recipient Dizzy for 1 round)
4. Clothesline (60% Success Chance, 20 Damage, Recipient Dizzy for 1 round)

You decide to use Clothesline against Naughty Cheerleader 1, hoping to land the hit and leave her dizzy. You charge towards her and extend your arm, aiming for her neck.

Outcome: Success! (Roll: 61)

Your Clothesline lands solidly, dealing 20 damage, and leaving Naughty Cheerleader 1 dizzy for one round!
Naughty Cheerleader 1 Hitpoints: 25 - 20 = 5

Naughty Cheerleader 1 is unable to attack this round due to her dizziness. However, Naughty Cheerleader 2 attempts a Spinning Kick and Naughty Cheerleader 3 goes for an Axe Kick.

Outcome:

Naughty Cheerleader 2: Spinning Kick - Missed! (Roll: 23) Damage: 0
Naughty Cheerleader 3: Axe Kick - Success! (Roll: 73) Damage: 15

Your Hitpoints: 105 - 15 (Axe Kick) = 90

It's your turn again! Which move will you use now?

1. Straight Punch (80% Success Chance, 10 Damage)
2. Body Blow (90% Success Chance, 5 Damage)
3. Uppercut (70% Success Chance, 15 Damage)
4. Spear Tackle (50% Success Chance, 25 Damage, Recipient Stunned for 1 round)
4. Spear Tackle (50% Success Chance, 25 Damage, Recipient Stunned for 1 round)

You decide to try a Spear Tackle on Naughty Cheerleader 2, hoping that the powerful attack will leave her stunned for a round. You lower your stance, charge at her with full speed, and attempt to drive your shoulder into her midsection.

Outcome: Success! (Roll: 52)

Your Spear Tackle lands perfectly, dealing 25 damage, and leaving Naughty Cheerleader 2 stunned for one round!
Naughty Cheerleader 2 Hitpoints: 40 - 25 = 15

Naughty Cheerleader 1, still dizzy, fails to attack effectively. Naughty Cheerleader 2 is unable to attack this round due to being stunned. Naughty Cheerleader 3 tries to punish you for your high-risk attack by throwing an Elbow Smash your way.

Outcome:
Naughty Cheerleader 3: Elbow Smash - Success! (Roll: 89) Damage: 10

Your Hitpoints: 90 - 10 (Elbow Smash) = 80

It's your turn again! Which move will you use now?

1. Low Kick (90% Success Chance, 5 Damage)
2. Shoulder Throw (70% Success Chance, 15 Damage)
3. Suplex (60% Success Chance, 20 Damage)
4. Powerbomb (30% Success Chance, 35 Damage)

Deciding to go for the high-risk, high-reward move, you attempt a Powerbomb on Naughty Cheerleader 3. You hope to quickly finish her off with one devastating attack. You grab her around her waist, lift her high up in the air, and ready yourself to drive her down onto the ground.

Outcome: Failure. (Roll: 28)

Unfortunately, Naughty Cheerleader 3 manages to wiggle free from your grasp just in time, landing back on her feet.

The Naughty Cheerleaders attack again. Naughty Cheerleader 1, no longer dizzy, goes for a Slap. Naughty Cheerleader 2, recovering from the stun, unleashes her Spinning Kick. Naughty Cheerleader 3, unshaken from evading the Powerbomb, attempts a High Kick.

Outcome:

Naughty Cheerleader 1: Slap - Success! (Roll: 90) Damage: 5
Naughty Cheerleader 2: Spinning Kick - Missed! (Roll: 45) Damage: 0
Naughty Cheerleader 3: High Kick - Success! (Roll: 75) Damage: 10

Your Hitpoints: 80 - 5 (Slap) - 10 (High Kick) = 65

It's your turn again! Which move will you use now?

1. Thrust Kick (80% Success Chance, 10 Damage)
2. Shoulder Throw (70% Success Chance, 15 Damage)
3. Suplex (60% Success Chance, 20 Damage)
4. Clothesline (60% Success Chance, 20 Damage, Recipient Dizzy for 1 round)
4. Clothesline (60% Success Chance, 20 Damage, Recipient Dizzy for 1 round)

You decide to use Clothesline again, this time targeting Naughty Cheerleader 3. You hope to land the hit and leave her dizzy for a round. You charge towards her and extend your arm, aiming for her neck.

Outcome: Failure. (Roll: 53)

Unfortunately, this time, Naughty Cheerleader 3 manages to duck under your arm, dodging the Clothesline attack.

The Naughty Cheerleaders attack again. Naughty Cheerleader 1 attempts another Slap while Naughty Cheerleader 2 goes for a Low Kick. Naughty Cheerleader 3 tries to make you pay for the missed Clothesline with a devastating Axe Kick.

Outcome:

Naughty Cheerleader 1: Slap - Success! (Roll: 91) Damage: 5
Naughty Cheerleader 2: Low Kick - Success! (Roll: 85) Damage: 5
Naughty Cheerleader 3: Axe Kick - Missed! (Roll: 65) Damage: 0

Your Hitpoints: 65 - 5 (Slap) - 5 (Low Kick) = 55

It's your turn again! Which move will you use now?

1. Straight Punch (80% Success Chance, 10 Damage)
2. Body Blow (90% Success Chance, 5 Damage)
3. Uppercut (70% Success Chance, 15 Damage)
4. Headlock (70% Success Chance, 5 Damage per Round, 70% Escape Chance, Recipient is locked in a submission)
Headlock (70% Success Chance, 5 Damage per Round, 70% Escape Chance, Recipient is locked in a submission)

You decide to use the Headlock against Naughty Cheerleader 1, hoping to lock her into submission and deal continuous damage per round. You quickly move in, wrapping your arm around her head and pulling it tight under your armpit.

Outcome: Success! (Roll: 71)

You successfully lock Naughty Cheerleader 1 into the Headlock! She struggles, but you hold on tight.

Naughty Cheerleader 1 Hitpoints: 5 - 5 (Headlock) = 0 (Knocked Out)

Naughty Cheerleader 1 is knocked out!

With Naughty Cheerleader 1 out of the fight, only two of them are left to attack. Naughty Cheerleader 2 goes for an Elbow Smash, while Naughty Cheerleader 3 attempts a High Kick.

Outcome:

Naughty Cheerleader 2: Elbow Smash - Success! (Roll: 81) Damage: 10
Naughty Cheerleader 3: High Kick - Missed! (Roll: 13) Damage: 0

Your Hitpoints: 55 - 10 (Elbow Smash) = 45

It's your turn again! Which move will you use now?

1. Low Kick (90% Success Chance, 5 Damage)
2. Shoulder Throw (70% Success Chance, 15 Damage)
3. Suplex (60% Success Chance, 20 Damage)
4. Spear Tackle (50% Success Chance, 25 Damage, Recipient Stunned for 1 round)

You decide to try a Suplex against Naughty Cheerleader 2. You move in, wrapping your arms around her waist and arching your back, hoping to lift and slam her onto the ground for some serious damage.

Outcome: Success! (Roll: 61)

Your Suplex lands perfectly, dealing 20 damage!
Naughty Cheerleader 2 Hitpoints: 15 - 20 = -5 (Knocked Out)

Naughty Cheerleader 2 is knocked out!

Only one Naughty Cheerleader remains. She goes all in, aiming to take you out with her powerful Spinning Kick.

Outcome:
Naughty Cheerleader 3: Spinning Kick - Missed! (Roll: 20) Damage: 0

Your Hitpoints: 45

It's your turn again! Which move will you use now?

1. Body Blow (90% Success Chance, 5 Damage)
2. Uppercut (70% Success Chance, 15 Damage)
3. Thrust Kick (80% Success Chance, 10 Damage)
4. Powerbomb (30% Success Chance, 35 Damage)
